case_title: SCALES ALTA FAYE VS HERBERT ADOLPH'S UPHOSTERY

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCALES ALTA FAYE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERBERT ADOLPH'S UPHOSTERY $500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $500.00, DEFENDANT TO MATCH LINES ON COUCH FABRIC BY 10/15/92 OR PAY THE SUM OF $500.00 TO PLAINTIFF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT HERBERT ADOLPH'S UPHOSTERY HEARING SET FOR MAR-08-1993 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 05

OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF MAR-17-1993, DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT HERBERT ADOLPH'S UPHOSTERY
